title: User Registration Success with Valid Email Activation
description: Validate that a user can successfully register with a unique email and password, receive an activation email, and activate their account via the email link.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page
Enter a unique and valid email address and a strong password
Submit the registration form
Verify a success message indicating email sent is shown
Simulate clicking the activation link received by email
Verify that the account is activated and user can now log in

title: User Registration Failure with Duplicate Email
description: Ensure registration fails when attempting to register with an already registered email.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page
Enter an email address already registered and a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify an error message indicating duplicate email is displayed

title: User Login Success with Correct Credentials and Rate Limiting
description: Verify that a registered and activated user can log in with valid credentials and that rate limiting protects against brute force attacks.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Enter valid email and password
Submit login form
Verify login is successful and user is redirected to homepage
Attempt multiple failed login attempts with wrong password exceeding limit
Verify that further login attempts are blocked temporarily due to rate limiting

title: User Login Failure with Incorrect Credentials
description: Verify that login fails with incorrect email or password and appropriate error message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter incorrect email or password
Submit login form
Verify that login is rejected with an error message

title: Password Reset Flow with Email OTP
description: Verify that password reset via email OTP works correctly including sending OTP, verifying it, and updating password securely.

steps.description: Navigate to password reset page
Enter registered email and submit password reset request
Verify OTP is sent via email
Input correct OTP received and new password
Submit the password reset form
Verify that password is updated and user can log in with new password

title: Password Reset Failure with Invalid OTP
description: Verify the system rejects password reset attempts with invalid or expired OTP codes.

steps.description: Request password reset to registered email
Input invalid or expired OTP and new password
Submit the password reset form
Verify error message indicating invalid OTP is shown and password is not changed

title: User Profile Update with Photo Upload
description: Verify users can update profile information and upload a profile photo, with appropriate file type and size validation.

steps.description: Log in as registered user
Navigate to profile page
Update profile fields and upload a valid photo file
Submit the profile update form
Verify changes are saved and new photo is displayed
Attempt to upload invalid photo file types or large files
Verify proper validation errors preventing upload

title: Product Listing with Filters, Sorting, and Pagination
description: Verify product listing page correctly applies filters (category, price range), sorting options, and paginates results accurately.

steps.description: Navigate to product listing page
Apply category filter
Verify displayed products belong to selected category
Apply price range filter
Verify all products fall within specified price range
Change sorting to price ascending and descending
Confirm products are sorted correctly
Navigate through pagination controls
Verify correct products are displayed for each page

title: Product Detail Page with Image Gallery and Reviews
description: Verify product detail page displays product information, an image gallery, and product reviews properly.

steps.description: Navigate to a specific product detail page
Verify product images are displayed and gallery navigation works
Verify product description, price, and specifications are shown accurately
Verify product reviews are displayed with author, rating, and comment

title: AJAX Shopping Cart Operations
description: Confirm that adding, updating quantity, and removing products from the shopping cart via AJAX works correctly and updates the UI and backend session data.

steps.description: Navigate to a product listing or detail page
Add a product to cart using AJAX button
Verify item is added to cart UI without page reload
Navigate to cart page
Update product quantity in cart via AJAX
Verify quantity and total price update correctly
Remove a product from the cart via AJAX
Verify item removal from cart UI and backend session

title: Coupon Code Application with Validation
description: Ensure users can apply valid coupons (percentage and fixed discount) during checkout and receive correct discounts; invalid or expired coupons are rejected.

steps.description: Add products to the cart
Enter a valid coupon code and apply
Verify discount amount is correctly calculated and reflected in total
Enter an invalid or expired coupon code and apply
Verify an error message indicating invalid coupon

title: Complete Checkout Flow with Shipping and Payment
description: Test completing an order by entering shipping data, applying any coupon, confirming simulated payment, and verifying order is recorded accurately.

steps.description: Add one or more products to cart
Proceed to checkout page
Fill in required shipping information
Optionally apply a valid coupon code
Select simulated payment option and submit order
Verify order confirmation page is shown with order details
Verify order is correctly stored in database including items, shipping address, status, and discounts

title: Admin Panel Access Restriction and Login
description: Verify that only authorized admin users can access admin panel pages and features; unauthorized users are redirected or blocked.

steps.description: Attempt to access admin dashboard URL as unauthenticated user
Verify user is redirected to admin login page
Log in as admin with correct credentials
Confirm successful login and access to admin dashboard
Log out and verify access is revoked again

title: Admin Product Management CRUD Operations
description: Test adding, editing, and deleting products through the admin panel and verify persistence in the database and visibility on the user product listing.

steps.description: Log in to admin panel
Navigate to product management page
Add a new product with valid data and save
Verify product appears in admin list and on user product listing
Edit an existing product details and save
Confirm changes reflect in admin list and user views
Delete a product
Verify product is removed from admin list and user listing

title: Admin Order Management and Status Update
description: Verify that admins can view all orders and update their statuses correctly, with changes persisting in the database.

steps.description: Access admin order management page
Verify list of orders with correct details is shown
Select an order and update its status (e.g., Processing to Shipped)
Save the status update
Verify updated status is saved and displayed

title: Admin User Management with CRUD
description: Confirm admins can view, edit, and delete user accounts, and that changes affect user access and data correctly.

steps.description: Access admin user management panel
Verify list of users with details is displayed
Edit a user profile and save changes
Confirm changes persist in database
Delete a user account
Verify user is removed and cannot log in anymore

title: Contact Form Submission and Email Notification
description: Test contact form with valid and invalid inputs to ensure data validation, successful submission, and triggering of notification emails.

steps.description: Navigate to Contact page
Fill in all required fields with valid data
Submit the form
Verify success message and email notification is triggered
Submit form with missing or invalid data
Verify validation errors are shown and form is not submitted

title: CSRF Token Presence and Validation on Sensitive Forms
description: Verify that all sensitive forms (registration, login, profile update, checkout, admin actions) include a valid CSRF token and reject submissions without or with invalid tokens.

steps.description: Load a sensitive form page (e.g., registration)
Check that a CSRF token hidden field exists
Submit form with valid CSRF token
Verify form submission is accepted
Submit form with missing or invalid CSRF token
Verify form submission is rejected with an error

title: XSS Prevention in User Inputs and Displayed Data
description: Ensure that all user inputs are sanitized and escaped to prevent cross-site scripting attacks on pages displaying user-generated content (e.g., reviews, profile updates).

steps.description: Submit user-generated content with XSS attack scripts (e.g., in reviews or profile fields)
Verify that the content is stored safely and scripts are not executed on any page
View pages displaying the user content
Check there is no JavaScript execution or DOM manipulation from injected scripts

title: Session Management and Expiry
description: Ensure user sessions are properly created at login and expire after 1 hour of inactivity as per configuration.

steps.description: Log in as a user
Verify session is created and user remains logged in across pages
Simulate 1 hour of inactivity
Verify session expires and user is logged out on next request

title: Responsive UI and Layout Adaptation
description: Verify that the site layout adapts correctly on different screen sizes and devices, preserving functionality and readability.

steps.description: Open homepage and main pages on desktop, tablet and mobile emulator or devices
Verify navigation menus, product grids, forms, and buttons resize and reposition appropriately
Check that no elements overlap or become inaccessible

title: Animations and Glassmorphism Effects Do Not Interfere with Usability
description: Verify that CSS animations and glassmorphism styling enhance user experience without causing performance or accessibility issues.

steps.description: Navigate through pages and interact with UI elements featuring animations
Ensure animations run smoothly without lag
Confirm accessibility features like keyboard navigation and screen reader compatibility are maintained
